children.value: という性質があるため（
行列式 |A B // B A| = |A-B||A+B| の証明 | ばたぱら

\left|\begin{array}{llll}
a & 1 & 1 & 1 \\
1 & a & 1 & 1 \\
1 & 1 & a & 1 \\
1 & 1 & 1 & a
\end{array}\right|
= 
\left|
    \begin{pmatrix}
    a & 1 \\
    1 & a 
    \end{pmatrix}
    +
    \begin{pmatrix}
    1 & 1 \\
    1 & 1 
    \end{pmatrix}
\right|
\left|
    \begin{pmatrix}
    a & 1 \\
    1 & a 
    \end{pmatrix}
    -
    \begin{pmatrix}
    1 & 1 \\
    1 & 1 
    \end{pmatrix}
\right|
\\
= 
\left|
    \begin{array}{cc}
    a+1 & 2 \\
    2 & a+1 
    \end{array}
\right|
\left|
    \begin{array}{cc}
    a - 1 & 0 \\
    0 & a - 1 
    \end{array}
\right|
\\
= \{ (a+1)^2 - 4 \} (a-1)^2
children.html: ∣a1111a1111a1111a∣=∣(a11a)+(1111)∣∣(a11a)−(1111)∣=∣a+122a+1∣∣a−100a−1∣={(a+1)2−4}(a−1)2\left|\begin{array}{llll} a & 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & a & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & a & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & 1 & a \end{array}\right| = \left| \begin{pmatrix} a & 1 \\ 1 & a \end{pmatrix} + \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 1 \end{pmatrix} \right| \left| \begin{pmatrix} a & 1 \\ 1 & a \end{pmatrix} - \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 1 \end{pmatrix} \right| \\ = \left| \begin{array}{cc} a+1 & 2 \\ 2 & a+1 \end{array} \right| \left| \begin{array}{cc} a - 1 & 0 \\ 0 & a - 1 \end{array} \right| \\ = \{ (a+1)^2 - 4 \} (a-1)^2∣∣​a111​1a11​11a1​111a​∣∣​=∣∣​(a1​1a​)+(11​11​)∣∣​∣∣​(a1​1a​)−(11​11​)∣∣​=∣∣​a+12​2a+1​∣∣​∣∣​a−10​0a−1​∣∣​={(a+1)2−4}(a−1)2

{(a+1)2−4}(a−1)2=(a+1)2(a−1)2−4(a−1)2=(a2+2a+1)(a2−2a+1)−4(a2−2a+1)=a2(a2−2a+1)+2a(a2−2a+1)+(a2−2a+1)−4(a2−2a+1)=a4−2a3+a2+2a3−4a2+2a+a2−2a+1−4a2+8a−4=a4−6a2+8a−3=(a−1)3(a+3)\begin{align} \{ (a+1)^2 - 4 \} (a-1)^2 &= (a+1)^2 (a-1)^2 - 4 (a-1)^2\\ &= (a^2 + 2a + 1)(a^2 - 2a + 1) - 4 (a^2 - 2a + 1)\\ &= a^2 (a^2 - 2a + 1) + 2a (a^2 - 2a + 1) + (a^2 - 2a + 1) - 4 (a^2 - 2a + 1)\\ &= a^4 - 2a^3 + a^2 + 2a^3 - 4a^2 + 2a + a^2 - 2a + 1 - 4a^2 + 8a - 4\\ &= a^4 - 6 a^2 + 8a - 3\\ &= (a - 1)^3 (a + 3) \end{align}{(a+1)2−4}(a−1)2​=(a+1)2(a−1)2−4(a−1)2=(a2+2a+1)(a2−2a+1)−4(a2−2a+1)=a2(a2−2a+1)+2a(a2−2a+1)+(a2−2a+1)−4(a2−2a+1)=a4−2a3+a2+2a3−4a2+2a+a2−2a+1−4a2+8a−4=a4−6a2+8a−3=(a−1)3(a+3)​​

children.value: 次の正則行列とすると、等式

children.html: ∣P−1AP∣=∣A∣\left|P^{-1} A P\right|=|A|∣∣​P−1AP∣∣​=∣A∣

children.value: が成り立つことを示せ。
行列式の積は分解できる（

children.html: ∣AB∣=∣A∣∣B∣|AB| = |A| |B|∣AB∣=∣A∣∣B∣
∣P−1AP∣=∣P−1∣∣A∣∣P∣\left|P^{-1} A P\right| =|P^{-1}| |A| |P|∣∣​P−1AP∣∣​=∣P−1∣∣A∣∣P∣
∣P−1∣∣P∣=∣P−1P∣=∣E∣=1|P^{-1}| |P| = |P^{-1} P| = |E| = 1∣P−1∣∣P∣=∣P−1P∣=∣E∣=1
∣P−1∣∣P∣=1→∣P−1∣=1∣P∣|P^{-1}| |P| = 1 \to |P^{-1}| = \frac{1}{|P|}∣P−1∣∣P∣=1→∣P−1∣=∣P∣1​
∣P−1∣∣A∣∣P∣=1∣P∣∣P∣∣A∣=∣A∣|P^{-1}| |A| |P| = \frac{1}{|P|} |P| |A| = |A|∣P−1∣∣A∣∣P∣=∣P∣1​∣P∣∣A∣=∣A∣

children.value:
import numpy as np
A = np.array([
    [1, 2],
    [0, 4]
])

P = np.array([
    [1, 2],
    [3, 4]
])

P_inv = np.linalg.inv(P)
det = np.linalg.det(P_inv) * np.linalg.det(P)
assert det.round(1) == 1
np.linalg.det(P_inv @ A @ P) == np.linalg.det(A)

∣AA−1∣=∣A∣∣A−1∣|A A^{-1}| = |A| |A^{-1}|∣AA−1∣=∣A∣∣A−1∣
∣A∣∣A−1∣=1→∣A−1∣=1∣A∣|A| |A^{-1}| = 1 \to |A^{-1}| = \frac{1}{|A|}∣A∣∣A−1∣=1→∣A−1∣=∣A∣1​
∣A−1∣=∣A∣−1|A^{-1}|=|A|^{-1}∣A−1∣=∣A∣−1
